answers: Make friends: join activities/classes, be genuinely interested in others, follow up, and be consistent in showing up.
Adult friendship is harder — you must be intentional. Schedule regular meetups, text first, and be vulnerable.
Tips: be a good listener, remember details, be reliable, and accept that not everyone will be your close friend.
Bondhu banano: community te join koro, genuine interest dekhao, follow up koro, ar niyomito dekha koro.
